user.title: Huawei OptiXstar v261a-20 Router Presence
user.description: Enter your v261a-20 admin credentials. Used to log in and read the connected-clients list for MAC-based presence detection.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect or log in. Check the host, username, and password.

init.title: Huawei OptiXstar v261a-20 Router Presence Options

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the router for connected devices.
data_description.consider_home: How long a device stays 'home' after last seen online, to smooth over missed polls (e.g. sleeping wifi radios).
